Spring Data Relational Parent
  1. org.springframework.data.jdbc.core
  2. JdbcAggregateOperations

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.JdbcAggregateOperations

Packages that use JdbcAggregateOperations
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jdbc.core
Core JDBC implementation.
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.aot
Ahead-of-Time (AOT) generation for Spring Data JDBC repositories.
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.query
Query derivation mechanism for JDBC specific repositories.
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.support
Support classes for integration of the repository programming model with JDBC.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JdbcAggregateTemplate
    JdbcAggregateOperations implementation, storing aggregates in and obtaining them from a JDBC data store.

    PartTreeJdbcQuery(JdbcQueryMethod queryMethod, JdbcAggregateOperations operations, RowMapperFactory rowMapperFactory)

    Creates a new StringBasedJdbcQuery for the given JdbcQueryMethod, JdbcAggregateOperations and RowMapperFactory.

    JdbcRepositoryFactoryBean.setJdbcAggregateOperations(JdbcAggregateOperations jdbcAggregateOperations)

    Constructor
    Description
